rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Abnormal LSASS Child and Parent Process Relationships (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)

rules.rule_text:
title: Abnormal LSASS Child and Parent Process Relationships (RedCanary Threat Detection
  Report)
id: 1afbb031-8721-45b3-b2ed-856515f68558
status: experimental
description: "Detects potential LSASS abuse based on unusual parent-child process\
  \ lineage patterns. \nPart of the RedCanary 2023 Threat Detection Report.\n"
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/lsass-memory/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2023/05/10
tags:
- attack.credential_access
- attack.t1003.001
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_1:
    ParentImage|endswith: \lsass.exe
    Image|endswith:
    - \cmd.exe
    - \powershell.exe
    - \regsvr32.exe
    - \mstsc.exe
    - \dllhost.exe
  selection_2:
    ParentImage|endswith:
    - \explorer.exe
    - \cmd.exe
    - \lsass.exe
    Image|endswith: \lsass.exe
  condition: 1 of selection*
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
